questions.question: With breakout roles for Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger, this 1999 film was a teen version of The Taming of the Shrew.
This popular novel by Helen Fielding was eventually made into a film starring Renee Zellweger and Colin Firth.
Justin Jeffre, Jeff Timmons, and brothers Drew and Nick Lachey made up what boy band?
And then there were two. In 2001, this member of the Fab Four died leaving only Paul and Ringo.
What was Phoebe looking at when she exclaimed, "My eyes! My eyes!"?
